prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, develop a specific protein binder targeting MS4A1 (Surface antigen) expressed by Homo sapiens. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. outline a methodology for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: MS4A1; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
